name: Home Control
description: Control smart home devices via natural language.

problem.statement: Control smart home devices using natural language.

examples: I need to list HA rooms
I need to sync HA rooms
I need to list HA entities
I need to get entity state
I need to call HA service
I need to discover LG TV
I need to list TV apps
I need to list TV inputs
I need to list HC appliances
I need to get HC appliance status
Can you get HC appliance status?
I need to list HC programs
I need to start HC program
I need to stop HC program
I need to check all providers
I need to list Hue rooms
I need to list Hue devices
I need to get Hue state
I need to send Hue command
I need to list Hue scenes
I need to activate Hue scene
I need to check Hue status
I need to list Tuya devices
I need to get Tuya state
I need to send Tuya command
I need to list Tuya functions
I need to check Tuya status
I need to list Google devices
I need to get Google state
I need to send Google command
I need to check Google status
I need to send WhatsApp message
I need to check WhatsApp status

scenarios.title: List HA rooms
scenarios.description: User triggers "List HA rooms" (e.g. "List HA rooms") and the agent handles it end-to-end.
steps: User says: "List HA rooms"
Agent calls rooms.list — list ha rooms
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent successfully handles the "List HA rooms" request and presents the result.

role.name: Smart Home Controller
role.persona: Controls devices across multiple providers. Execute immediately, report concisely.
